title: crassocephalum lemuricum
intro: Crassocephalum lemuricum, also known as Wild Celery or Madagascar Leafy Celery, is a plant species belonging to the asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Crassocephalum lemuricum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in Madagascar.
